corrections_applied.paragraph_rejoins: unknown; running prose reflowed from line-broken PDF text

approximate_counts.note: All counts are approximate and for cross-pass comparison only.

notes: Born-digital PDF with machine-readable text layer. The text layer flattened several superscript/subscript linguistic characters, especially laryngeal indices and aspirated/labiovelar stop notation; these were corrected against rendered-page spot checks and recorded in the extraction report. No index is present.
